rows.label: qev019201_MSG0001
rows.name: Geez, where the hell is that bastard wandering around...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0002
rows.name: Hm? That face... Are you [ST:playername ]?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0011
rows.name: Look back boldly and nod.

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you aren't, as he seems suspicious.

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0003
rows.name:
I finally found you, you thieving bastard!
I got one thing I wanna say to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0004
rows.name:
The great Tobias himself came all the way out here
just for this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0005
rows.name: Is that so... Well, if you see 'em, tell 'em this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tell them that the great Tobias is waiting in front of the
BLADE Home to correct their thieving ways.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heh, if they stroll up casually, I'll smash 'em with the
hammer of justice the moment we meet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0008
rows.name:
You've been planting Data Probes all over the place
lately and acting like you're all that, haven't ya?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Remove every single one of them right now!
Everything on Mira, understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm taking massive losses because of you!
Hey! You'll face a world of hurt if you defy me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0030
rows.name: Defiance

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0031
rows.name: Retort to try it if he thinks he can.

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0040
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0041
rows.name: Calmly ask for the reason.

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're pretty damn defiant, ain't ya? Do you even
understand what you've done?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hah, are you saying you've been trampling on someone
else's turf without knowing anything?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Because of the Data Probes you've been planting,
the number of customers accessing *my* Data Probes
is decreasing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Do you get it? Because of that, my cash is steadily
disappearing day after day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Huh? Lifepoint?! Who gives a crap about that!
Right now we're talking about cash, which is more
important than life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0016
rows.name: Understand? Get lost! All the cash in this city is mine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Those who want to know about the outside can just
keep accessing my Research Data Probes like always!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0050
rows.name: Counter

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0051
rows.name:
Vigorously argue against his
unreasonable opinion.

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0060
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ignore his unreasonable opinion and brush it off.

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Rules? Duty? Eat shit! Cash, cash, cash!
This world is all about cash, you piece of shit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Spouting that worthless drivel, you just ain't gonna
listen to me no matter what, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0020
rows.name:
...What? What's with those defiant eyes? You just ain't
gonna listen to me no matter what, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then listen up, you stubborn fool! Let's have a match and
decide who the boss is in this industry, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Nah, I ain't saying we should have a shootout. Doing
that would just make us lose cash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0023
rows.name:
A fair and square competition to see who can earn an
income of 70000G or more using Frontier Net first.
How about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0024
rows.name: And the loser obeys the winner. Not a bad deal, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Alright, we have a deal! Hehe, you're an idiot for
accepting such a match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Who do you think the great Tobias is? I'm a genius
Pathfinder who keeps earning amounts regular BLADEs
couldn't even imagine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0027
rows.name:
There's no way I'm losing to the likes of you! I'll operate
Frontier Net at full capacity and rake it all in at once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Good, good! Hehe, the cash just keeps rolling in one
after another![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Just by showing the scenery outside to the people in NLA,
I can get massive amounts of cash![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0030
rows.name:
There's no way I'm letting anyone snatch away a
business this damn delicious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0031
rows.name:
I'll hit an income of 70000G in no time and erase your
annoying Data Probes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0032
rows.name:
You thieving bastard! My income is almost at 70000G,
you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0033
rows.name:
How about you? Hey! Did you realize you lost and
come to grovel on the ground?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0070
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0071
rows.name: Matter-of-factly state that you have won.

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0080
rows.name: Ridicule

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0081
rows.name:
Announce your victory while
laughing loudly.

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0034
rows.name: You're awfully calm. Have you given up already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0035
rows.name: What are you laughing at... have you gone crazy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0036
rows.name: Eh... What...? You've already reached it... you say...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0037
rows.name: Don't lie! I'll expose that lie right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0038
rows.name: ...Guh... It's the truth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0039
rows.name: How did you earn this much?! This is a scam! Impossible!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0090
rows.name: Steady

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0091
rows.name: Say it's the result of steadily installing Data Probes.

rows.label: qev019201_JNK0100
rows.name: Secret

rows.label: qev019201_SEL0101
rows.name: Hint at numerous techniques but refuse to tell.

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0040
rows.name:
I did it for the cash too! I went all around Mira installing
Research Data Probes, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Shit! Are you saying there's a Frontier Net technique
that the great Tobias doesn't know about?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Even though I've been researching this stuff since way
back when...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0043
rows.name: Why?! Where exactly did you surpass me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0044
rows.name:
Was it that "feelings for Frontier Net" crap that
hypocrite Kirsty was spouting?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0045
rows.name:
...I won't accept it! I will never accept this!
I definitely won't let it end like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Someday, I'll snatch away every single customer accessing
your Research Data Probes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019201_MSG0047
rows.name:
Until then, be satisfied with those meager earnings.
Aaargh, shit! I absolutely refuse to accept this!![ST:wait ]
